version.author: Bertrand C
version.changelog: Initial release with core features: - Preset and Scene automation via Reaper Regions. - Gig View auto-activation on Play and Tuner on Stop. - Basic logging for Preset/Scene changes and Transport status.

version.name: 2.0-dev
version.author: Bertrand C
version.changelog: - Split from original Quad Cortex MIDI control script to create a more modular and maintainable codebase. - Added a setup wizard for first-time configuration. - Improved logging and error handling. - Automatically creates the MIDI output track if it doesn't exist.
